column1: # Freematics ONE+ custom partition table – dual OTA app partitions
# Works on both 4 MB and 16 MB flash.  The total used space is 0x3F0000
# (≈ 3.94 MB) which leaves room on 4 MB devices and is well within 16 MB.
# Two equal-sized OTA app partitions (app0/ota_0 and app1/ota_1) are
# required for ESP-IDF OTA to work.  The default huge_app.csv only has
# to return the currently running partition.  esp_ota_begin() then fails with
# ESP_ERR_OTA_PARTITION_CONFLICT and the Arduino Update library calls abort().
#   app1     @ 0x200000   1.94 MB (0x1F0000) – OTA slot 1 (first OTA target)
